preMirrorDrift.rootCause: TT-2E lock/publish workflow advanced cloud SSOT while club_data_v3 blob remained at pre-TT-2E draft/lineup_open state

liveCompareDuringVerify.note: May race with locking/idempotency probes in same verify run; prefer SHADOW_POST_MIRROR.json

legacy.name: team_tournament_save_lineup_draft_legacy
legacy.args: p_tournament_id text, p_matchup_id text, p_team_id text, p_selections jsonb

tt1b.name: team_tournament_upsert_standings
tt1b.args: p_tournament_id text, p_standings jsonb, p_expected_version integer, p_idempotency_key text

checks.expected: no version column (not in TT-1B SSOT)
no SELECT policy; ALL policies require manage or super_admin
